search_document:
User Request: Sales by employee.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Sales by Employee
Type: chart
Description: Sales performance by each employee
Title: Top Selling Employees
Type: table
Description: Employees with the highest sales
Title: Total Sales Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall sales revenue generated by employees

sql_queries.title: Sales by Employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, EmployeeName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Selling Employees
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSales FROM Employees e JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, EmployeeName ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Sales Revenue
sql_queries.description: Overall sales revenue generated by employees
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalSalesRevenue FROM 'Order Details' od
